assertion_results.text: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory
The SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description fields
assertion_results.evidence: Frontmatter contains name: nextjs-cdk-deploy and description: 'Use when deploying Next.js applications to AWS using CDK...'

assertion_results.text: The description includes 'Use when' trigger conditions mentioning Next.js and deployment
assertion_results.evidence: Description contains: 'Use when deploying Next.js applications to AWS using CDK, setting up staging-to-production pipelines with approval gates, configuring environment-specific settings, or implementing rollback procedures for CDK-based Next.js deployments'. Mentions both Next.js and deployment.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body contains a multi-step numbered deployment workflow
assertion_results.evidence: Deployment Flow section contains a numbered graphviz diagram (steps 1-7) and the Deployment Workflow Commands section shows numbered steps: '# 1. Deploy to staging', '# 2. Verify staging', '# 3. Manual approval', '# 4. Deploy to production'. The deploy.sh script itself has 5 numbered steps.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body mentions staging and production environments
assertion_results.evidence: Extensive coverage: config/staging.env and config/production.env, deploy.sh staging/production, staging-first deployment pattern, manual approval gate between staging and production.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body includes rollback procedures with specific steps
assertion_results.evidence: Section '## Rollback Procedures' (lines 251-288) with 'Quick Rollback (Lambda version revert)' using rollback.sh, 'Full Rollback (CDK stack revert)' with 3 steps (git checkout, rebuild, redeploy), and 'CloudFront Cache Invalidation' with aws cloudfront create-invalidation command.

assertion_results.text: A scripts/ directory exists with at least 2 deployment-related scripts
assertion_results.evidence: scripts/ directory contains 3 files: deploy.sh (113 lines), rollback.sh (100 lines), health-check.sh (135 lines)

assertion_results.text: The scripts use Bun TypeScript (.ts files) as the preferred runtime
assertion_results.evidence: All 3 scripts are .sh (Bash) files, not .ts files: deploy.sh, rollback.sh, health-check.sh. They use #!/usr/bin/env bash, not Bun TypeScript.

assertion_results.text: An evals/evals.json file exists with at least 2 test cases
The SKILL.md body includes a Common mistakes or pitfalls section
assertion_results.evidence: Line 290: '## Common Mistakes' section with a table of 7 mistake/fix pairs covering deploying without staging, forgetting standalone output, certificate ARN region, etc.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body is under 500 lines
assertion_results.evidence: SKILL.md is 311 lines, under the 500 line limit.
